  Added a Gmail label that contains exactly the warm-up drafts requiring human attention, eliminating the need to run the preview script or sift the AI/Warm-up label (which also holds the auto-send clean tier). The weekday auto-send run now reconciles the AI/Needs Review label diff-style: flagged drafts gain it, drafts that become clean or get sent or discarded lose it automatically. Applied live to the current queue: 16 drafts labeled, of which 14 are high-leverage Hosts Circles prospects and 2 are bad-address cases.
